nasb.text: “You shall charge the sons of Israel, that they bring you clear oil of beaten olives for the light, to make a lamp burn continually.

esv.text: “You shall command the people of Israel that they bring to you pure beaten olive oil for the light, that a lamp may regularly be set up to burn.

cnv.text: “你要吩咐以色列民把打成的純橄欖油拿來給你，是為點燈用的，使燈常常點著。

ccb.text: “你要吩咐以色列百姓，把榨出的纯橄榄油拿来做会幕内的灯油，使灯台上的灯经常亮着。
